title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Mini 2.5G
description: The Ubiquiti Switch Flex Mini 2.5G is a compact switch designed to expand network in home and office environments. It offers five 2.5 Gigabit ports that enable easy integration of devices with higher transfer speeds, such as modern access points, servers, or NAS storage. The switch supports management through the UniFi Network app, making configuration and network monitoring easier One of its key features is the support for Power over Ethernet , which means devices can be powered directly through the network cable using the PoE input on the first port (802.3af/at), or alternatively, using the included USB-C adapter With its minimalist design, it is ideal for placement on a desk or for wall mounting. It is fully compatible with UniFi systems and allows for easy scaling as needed Device USB-C power adapter (5V / 1A)
